question: KHL finals: Lokomotiv vs Ak Bars

evidences.title: The 2026 Gagarin Cup finals are here! : News - KHL
evidences.content: # The 2026 Gagarin Cup finals are here! ##### Lokomotiv enters its third consecutive Gagarin Cup finals, this time facing Ak Bars in a repeat of the first-ever finals back in 2009. The Railwaymen needed two OTs in Game Seven against Avangard to get there, while the Kazan side handed a 4-1 defeat to regular-season champions, Metallurg. Ak Bars is currently tied with CSKA and Metallurg for the most Gagarin Cup titles with three apiece, and now has the opportunity to become the competition’s outright most successful franchise with a fourth championship. Lokomotiv, meanwhile, is chasing its second title after last year’s triumph. 14:30: Lokomotiv (1stW) vs Ak Bars (3rdE) Series stand: 0-0. Series history: 2009. Gagarin Cup finals matchup. Ak Bars defeated Lokomotiv 4-3. [...] Milestone alert Lokomotiv’s goalie Alexei Melnichuk may record his 10th KHL shutout. Lokomotiv’s forward Pavel Kraskovsky may reach 200 league points (currently at 198). Lokomotiv’s goalie Daniil Isayev may record his 40th career shutout. Lokomotiv’s forward Artur Kayumov may record his 300th career point (currently at 298). Lokomotiv’s head coach Bob Hartley can celebrate his 50th win in the Gagarin Cup playof...

evidences.title: «Локомотив» – «Ак Барс»: ремейк первого финала Кубка Гагарина спустя 17 лет: Новости | Континентальная Хоккейная Лига (КХЛ)
evidences.content: Финал между «Локомотивом» и «Ак Барсом» – то, с чего началась КХЛ. В 2009-м эти команды выдали феерическую серию с седьмым матчем, в котором всё в пользу Казани решила одна-единственная шайба. 17 лет спустя соперники готовы снова зажечь по-настоящему: есть предчувствие, что нынешнее противостояние получится ещё более захватывающим, ярким и непредсказуемым. Матчи финала между «Локомотивом» и «Ак Барсом» пройдут 11, 13, 15, 17 и, если потребуется, 19, 21 и 23 мая. ## Упоминания Ак Барс (Казань) Локомотив (Ярославль) ## Поделиться Прямая ссылка на материал ## Популярные видео 08:46 898 Топ-20 силовых сезона КХЛ 2025/2026 14:29 1430 Топ-30 сэйвов сезона КХЛ 2025/2026 ## Популярные фото ## Партнеры [...] П2 2.90 НХКШДР Нижнекамск П1 1.85 x 4.30 П2 3.60 ММГАМР Магнитогорск П1 1.40 x 5.50 П2 6.40 АВТТРК Екатеринбург ДМНТОР Минск СЕВЛАД Череповец БАРСИБ Астана АВГСЮЛ Омск ЦСКСПР Москва СКАДИН Санкт-Петербург АКБАДМ Казань ММГАМР Магнитогорск НХКСОЧ Нижнекамск ЛОКШДР Ярославль ДИНАДМ Москва ЦСКТОР Москва БАРСЮЛ Астана АКБТРК Казань Алексей Анисимов специально для khl.ru # «Локомотив» – «Ак Барс»: ремейк первого финала Кубка Гагарина спустя 17 лет ##### KHL.ru представляет превью финала К...

evidences.content: Goalkeeper Timur Bilyalov captures 93.6% of shots in the playoffs with a reliability factor of 2.07, according to data from the KHL website. Artem Galimov stands out in attack (seven goals). The most experienced Alexander Radulov adds power and leadership. ## A tactical puzzle: How can the match go The scenario of the first match will largely determine who will impose their rules on the opponent faster. The goalkeepers' play is seen as a key factor. If Bilyalov continues to demonstrate his current 93.6% of deflected shots, Ak Bars will have the opportunity to build a layered defense and count on counterattacks. [...] On the opposite side is Daniil Isaev, whose cup experience is also beyond doubt: the goalkeeper of Lokomotiv has gone through three finals in a row and knows the value of every save. In attack, everything will depend on the implementation of the moments. Ak Bars' defense, built by Gatiyatulin, is extremely reluctant to allow opponents to linger on a dime. Shalunov and his partners will have to look for non—standard moves - medium-range shots, finishing shots, and playing on bounces. evidences.title: Gagarin Cup 2026: Schedule, Favorites, and Editorial Predictions
evidences.content: Lokomotiv – Salavat Yulaev Avangard – Severstal Metallurg – SKA Dinamo Minsk – Ak Bars In the semifinals, the series will feature Lokomotiv vs. Avangard and Metallurg vs. Ak Bars, with Metallurg and Lokomotiv meeting in the finals, and the trophy going to the Magnitogorsk club. ## Special Bets on KHL Playoffs ### Total Over 83.5 Matches in the Tournament Odds: 1.72 The prime era of the KHL, when from 2010 to 2014, 83 playoff games were played four years in a row, has shifted to a period with fewer games (from 2015 to 2022, not even 81 games were played). However, in the last three years, the situation has changed – there are fewer one-sided series, and in 2023 and 2025, teams even played 87 games for the Gagarin Cup. ### Total Seven-Game Series Over 3.5 Odds: 1.9 [...] ## How the KHL Playoffs Work In the KHL playoffs, where the best team will win the Gagarin Cup, 16 clubs participate – the top 8 teams from the regular season in both the Western and Eastern Conferences. Below is the list of participants for the 2026 Gagarin Cup. ### Western Conference Lokomotiv (Yaroslavl) Dinamo (Minsk) Severstal (Cherepovets) CSKA (Moscow) SKA (St. Petersburg) Torpedo (Nizhny Novgorod) Dynamo (...

evidences.title: Lokomotiv takes game one : News | Kontinental Hockey League (KHL)
evidences.content: Alexander Radulov rolled back the years with a goal and an assist as Lokomotiv took the lead in the 2026 Gagarin Cup final. The 39-year-old played a crucial part in the Railwaymen’s victory in Monday’s series opener on home ice in Yaroslavl. Radulov, of course, won the title in 2011 with Salavat Yulaev and again last season with Lokomotiv. That’s the longest gap between Gagarin Cup wins of any player. This year’s series, meanwhile, has its own memory lane aspect: 17 years ago, these teams met in the first ever KHL grand final. [...] None of the players from that series are still active, but their presence still makes itself felt this year. Lokomotiv’s goalie that year, Georgy Gelashvili, is now coaching the netminders at Ak Bars. Sergei Zvyagin is an assistant coach to Bob Hartley, and golden goal scorer Alexei Morozov is the current KHL president. The previous Gagarin Cup final meeting between these teams began with a Lokomotiv victory in Kazan. This series started with the home team assessed a bench minor and Ak Bars creating several chances. Kirill Semyonov came closest, but his shot rebounded off the post to safety. [...] © КХЛ 2008—2026 All rights reserved

[...] Current form The Kazan club completes the campaign for the fourth Gagarin Cup in its history. The previous time Kazan lifted the trophy over their heads was in the 2017-2018 season. The team's path to the finals this season began with a confident third place in the Eastern Conference with 38 wins in 68 matches in regular time and a goal difference of 212-169. In the one-eighth stage, Ak Bars overcame the resistance of Chelyabinsk Tractor 4-1 (3:2, FROM; 4:2; 2:3; 3:2, OT; 2:1, OT), in the quarterfinals, Anvar Gatiyatullin's team met the minimum number of matches against Dinamo Minsk, who had a great season 4-0 (2:1; 5:4, FROM; 4:0; 3:2), And then, in the semifinal series, Metallurg, the season's leader, was blocked from reaching the finals. 4-1 (5:2; 2:4; 4:1; 4:1; 4:3, FROM).
